apekrithē o iēsous ouk eiches exousian oudemian kat emou ei mē ēn soi dedomenon anōthen dia touto o paradidous me soi meizona amartian echei
ek toutou ezētei o pilatos apolysai auton oi de ioudaioi ekrazon legontes ean touton apolysēs ouk ei philos tou kaisaros pas o basilea auton poiōn antilegei tō kaisari
o oun pilatos akousas touton ton logon ēgagen exō ton iēsoun kai ekathisen epi tou bēmatos eis topon legomenon lithostrōton ebraisti de gabbatha
ēn de paraskeuē tou pascha ōra de ōsei ektē kai legei tois ioudaiois ide o basileus ymōn
oi de ekraugasan aron aron staurōson auton legei autois o pilatos ton basilea ymōn staurōsō apekrithēsan oi archiereis ouk echomen basilea ei mē kaisara
tote oun paredōken auton autois ina staurōthē parelabon de ton iēsoun kai apēgagon
kai bastazōn ton stauron autou exēlthen eis ton legomenon kraniou topon os legetai ebraisti golgotha
opou auton estaurōsan kai met autou allous dyo enteuthen kai enteuthen meson de ton iēsoun
egrapsen de kai titlon o pilatos kai ethēken epi tou staurou ēn de gegrammenon iēsous o nazōraios o basileus tōn ioudaiōn
touton oun ton titlon polloi anegnōsan tōn ioudaiōn oti engys ēn tēs poleōs o topos opou estaurōthē o iēsous kai ēn gegrammenon ebraisti ellēnisti rōmaisti
elegon oun tō pilatō oi archiereis tōn ioudaiōn mē graphe o basileus tōn ioudaiōn all oti ekeinos eipen basileus eimi tōn ioudaiōn
apekrithē o pilatos o gegrapha gegrapha
oi oun stratiōtai ote estaurōsan ton iēsoun elabon ta imatia autou kai epoiēsan tessara merē ekastō stratiōtē meros kai ton chitōna ēn de o chitōn arraphos ek tōn anōthen yphantos di olou

eipon oun pros allēlous mē schisōmen auton alla lachōmen peri autou tinos estai ina ē graphē plērōthē ē legousa diemerisanto ta imatia mou eautois kai epi ton imatismon mou ebalon klēron oi men oun stratiōtai tauta epoiēsan
eistēkeisan de para tō staurō tou iēsou ē mētēr autou kai ē adelphē tēs mētros autou maria ē tou klōpa kai maria ē magdalēnē
iēsous oun idōn tēn mētera kai ton mathētēn parestōta on ēgapa legei tē mētri autou gynai idou o uios sou
eita legei tō mathētē idou ē mētēr sou kai ap ekeinēs tēs ōras elaben autēn o mathētēs eis ta idia
meta touto eidōs o iēsous oti panta ēdē tetelestai ina teleiōthē ē graphē legei dipsō
skeuos oun ekeito oxous meston oi de plēsantes spongon oxous kai yssōpō perithentes prosēnenkan autou tō stomati
ote oun elaben to oxos o iēsous eipen tetelestai kai klinas tēn kephalēn paredōken to pneuma
oi oun ioudaioi ina mē meinē epi tou staurou ta sōmata en tō sabbatō epei paraskeuē ēn ēn gar megalē ē ēmera ekeinē tou sabbatou ērōtēsan ton pilaton ina kateagōsin autōn ta skelē kai arthōsin
ēlthon oun oi stratiōtai kai tou men prōtou kateaxan ta skelē kai tou allou tou systaurōthentos autō
epi de ton iēsoun elthontes ōs eidon auton ēdē tethnēkota ou kateaxan autou ta skelē
all eis tōn stratiōtōn lonchē autou tēn pleuran enyxen kai euthys exēlthen aima kai ydōr
kai o eōrakōs memartyrēken kai alēthinē autou estin ē martyria kakeinos oiden oti alēthē legei ina ymeis pisteusēte
egeneto gar tauta ina ē graphē plērōthē ostoun ou syntribēsetai autou
kai palin etera graphē legei opsontai eis on exekentēsan

meta de tauta ērōtēsen ton pilaton o iōsēph o apo arimathaias ōn mathētēs tou iēsou kekrymmenos de dia ton phobon tōn ioudaiōn ina arē to sōma tou iēsou kai epetrepsen o pilatos ēlthen oun kai ēren to sōma tou iēsou
ēlthen de kai nikodēmos o elthōn pros ton iēsoun nyktos to prōton pherōn migma smyrnēs kai aloēs ōsei litras ekaton
elabon oun to sōma tou iēsou kai edēsan auto othoniois meta tōn arōmatōn kathōs ethos estin tois ioudaiois entaphiazein
ēn de en tō topō opou estaurōthē kēpos kai en tō kēpō mnēmeion kainon en ō oudepō oudeis etethē
ekei oun dia tēn paraskeuēn tōn ioudaiōn oti engys ēn to mnēmeion ethēkan ton iēsoun
tē de mia tōn sabbatōn maria ē magdalēnē erchetai prōi skotias eti ousēs eis to mnēmeion kai blepei ton lithon ērmenon ek tou mnēmeiou
trechei oun kai erchetai pros simōna petron kai pros ton allon mathētēn on ephilei o iēsous kai legei autois ēran ton kyrion ek tou mnēmeiou kai ouk oidamen pou ethēkan auton
exēlthen oun o petros kai o allos mathētēs kai ērchonto eis to mnēmeion
etrechon de oi dyo omou kai o allos mathētēs proedramen tachion tou petrou kai ēlthen prōtos eis to mnēmeion
kai parakypsas blepei keimena ta othonia ou mentoi eisēlthen
erchetai oun simōn petros akolouthōn autō kai eisēlthen eis to mnēmeion kai theōrei ta othonia keimena
kai to soudarion o ēn epi tēs kephalēs autou ou meta tōn othoniōn keimenon alla chōris entetyligmenon eis ena topon
tote oun eisēlthen kai o allos mathētēs o elthōn prōtos eis to mnēmeion kai eiden kai episteusen
oudepō gar ēdeisan tēn graphēn oti dei auton ek nekrōn anastēnai
apēlthon oun palin pros eautous oi mathētai
maria de eistēkei pros to mnēmeion klaiousa exō ōs oun eklaien parekypsen eis to mnēmeion
kai theōrei dyo angelous en leukois kathezomenous ena pros tē kephalē kai ena pros tois posin opou ekeito to sōma tou iēsou
kai legousin autē ekeinoi gynai ti klaieis legei autois oti ēran ton kyrion mou kai ouk oida pou ethēkan auton
kai tauta eipousa estraphē eis ta opisō kai theōrei ton iēsoun estōta kai ouk ēdei oti o iēsous estin
legei autē o iēsous gynai ti klaieis tina zēteis ekeinē dokousa oti o kēpouros estin legei autō kyrie ei sy ebastasas auton eipe moi pou auton ethēkas kagō auton arō
legei autē o iēsous maria strapheisa ekeinē legei autō rabbouni o legetai didaskale
legei autē o iēsous mē mou aptou oupō gar anabebēka pros ton patera mou poreuou de pros tous adelphous mou kai eipe autois anabainō pros ton patera mou kai patera ymōn kai theon mou kai theon ymōn
erchetai maria ē magdalēnē apangellousa tois mathētais oti eōraken ton kyrion kai tauta eipen autē

ousēs oun opsias tē ēmera ekeinē tē mia tōn sabbatōn kai tōn thyrōn kekleismenōn opou ēsan oi mathētai synēgmenoi dia ton phobon tōn ioudaiōn ēlthen o iēsous kai estē eis to meson kai legei autois eirēnē ymin
kai touto eipōn edeixen autois tas cheiras kai tēn pleuran autou echarēsan oun oi mathētai idontes ton kyrion
eipen oun autois o iēsous palin eirēnē ymin kathōs apestalken me o patēr kagō pempō ymas
kai touto eipōn enephysēsen kai legei autois labete pneuma agion
an tinōn aphēte tas amartias aphientai autois an tinōn kratēte kekratēntai
thōmas de eis ek tōn dōdeka o legomenos didymos ouk ēn met autōn ote ēlthen o iēsous

elegon oun autō oi alloi mathētai eōrakamen ton kyrion o de eipen autois ean mē idō en tais chersin autou ton typon tōn ēlōn kai balō ton daktylon mou eis ton typon tōn ēlōn kai balō tēn cheira mou eis tēn pleuran autou ou mē pisteusō
kai meth ēmeras oktō palin ēsan esō oi mathētai autou kai thōmas met autōn erchetai o iēsous tōn thyrōn kekleismenōn kai estē eis to meson kai eipen eirēnē ymin
eita legei tō thōma phere ton daktylon sou ōde kai ide tas cheiras mou kai phere tēn cheira sou kai bale eis tēn pleuran mou kai mē ginou apistos alla pistos
kai apekrithē o thōmas kai eipen autō o kyrios mou kai o theos mou
legei autō o iēsous oti eōrakas me thōma pepisteukas makarioi oi mē idontes kai pisteusantes
polla men oun kai alla sēmeia epoiēsen o iēsous enōpion tōn mathētōn autou a ouk estin gegrammena en tō bibliō toutō
tauta de gegraptai ina pisteusēte oti o iēsous estin o christos o uios tou theou kai ina pisteuontes zōēn echēte en tō onomati autou
meta tauta ephanerōsen eauton palin o iēsous tois mathētais epi tēs thalassēs tēs tiberiados ephanerōsen de outōs
ēsan omou simōn petros kai thōmas o legomenos didymos kai nathanaēl o apo kana tēs galilaias kai oi tou zebedaiou kai alloi ek tōn mathētōn autou dyo
legei autois simōn petros ypagō alieuein legousin autō erchometha kai ēmeis syn soi exēlthon kai anebēsan eis to ploion euthys kai en ekeinē tē nykti epiasan ouden
prōias de ēdē genomenēs estē o iēsous eis ton aigialon ou mentoi ēdeisan oi mathētai oti iēsous estin
legei oun autois o iēsous paidia mē ti prosphagion echete apekrithēsan autō ou
o de eipen autois balete eis ta dexia merē tou ploiou to diktyon kai eurēsete ebalon oun kai ouk eti auto elkysai ischysan apo tou plēthous tōn ichthyōn
legei oun o mathētēs ekeinos on ēgapa o iēsous tō petrō o kyrios estin simōn oun petros akousas oti o kyrios estin ton ependytēn diezōsato ēn gar gymnos kai ebalen eauton eis tēn thalassan
oi de alloi mathētai tō ploiariō ēlthon ou gar ēsan makran apo tēs gēs all ōs apo pēchōn diakosiōn syrontes to diktyon tōn ichthyōn
ōs oun apebēsan eis tēn gēn blepousin anthrakian keimenēn kai opsarion epikeimenon kai arton
legei autois o iēsous enenkate apo tōn opsariōn ōn epiasate nyn
anebē simōn petros kai eilkysen to diktyon epi tēs gēs meston ichthyōn megalōn ekaton pentēkontatriōn kai tosoutōn ontōn ouk eschisthē to diktyon
legei autois o iēsous deute aristēsate oudeis de etolma tōn mathētōn exetasai auton sy tis ei eidotes oti o kyrios estin
erchetai oun o iēsous kai lambanei ton arton kai didōsin autois kai to opsarion omoiōs
touto ēdē triton ephanerōthē o iēsous tois mathētais autou egertheis ek nekrōn
ote oun ēristēsan legei tō simōni petrō o iēsous simōn iōna agapas me pleion toutōn legei autō nai kyrie sy oidas oti philō se legei autō boske ta arnia mou
legei autō palin deuteron simōn iōna agapas me legei autō nai kyrie sy oidas oti philō se legei autō poimaine ta probata mou
legei autō to triton simōn iōna phileis me elypēthē o petros oti eipen autō to triton phileis me kai eipen autō kyrie sy panta oidas sy ginōskeis oti philō se legei autō o iēsous boske ta probata mou
amēn amēn legō soi ote ēs neōteros ezōnnyes seauton kai periepateis opou ētheles otan de gērasēs ekteneis tas cheiras sou kai allos se zōsei kai oisei opou ou theleis
touto de eipen sēmainōn poiō thanatō doxasei ton theon kai touto eipōn legei autō akolouthei moi
epistrapheis de o petros blepei ton mathētēn on ēgapa o iēsous akolouthounta os kai anepesen en tō deipnō epi to stēthos autou kai eipen kyrie tis estin o paradidous se
touton idōn o petros legei tō iēsou kyrie outos de ti
legei autō o iēsous ean auton thelō menein eōs erchomai ti pros se sy akolouthei moi
exēlthen oun o logos outos eis tous adelphous oti o mathētēs ekeinos ouk apothnēskei kai ouk eipen autō o iēsous oti ouk apothnēskei all ean auton thelō menein eōs erchomai ti pros se
outos estin o mathētēs o martyrōn peri toutōn kai grapsas tauta kai oidamen oti alēthēs estin ē martyria autou
estin de kai alla polla osa epoiēsen o iēsous atina ean graphētai kath en oude auton oimai ton kosmon chōrēsai ta graphomena biblia amēn
